scripts.validate: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');const {readdirSync,statSync}=require('fs');const {join}=require('path');function walk(d){for(const f of readdirSync(d)){const p=join(d,f);const s=statSync(p);if(s.isDirectory())walk(p);else if(p.endsWith('.js'))execSync('node --check '+JSON.stringify(p),{stdio:'inherit'});}}walk('src');console.log('All files OK');"
